title: Indulgent Mexican Wild Garlic Leaves Tacos
description: Fresh and fluffy tacos filled with wild garlic leaves and deep-fry tofu, perfect for a shojin-friendly meal. This Oaxacan-inspired dish is a delight for the senses.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the deep-fry tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the wild garlic leaves and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the tofu and garlic leaf mixture onto a tortilla and squeezing a sliver of lime juice on top.
Season with salt to taste and serve immediately.
